allow: PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Output "Killed $proc" } else { Write-Output "Nothing on 3000" })

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const {createClient}=require\('@supabase/supabase-js'\);const env=fs.readFileSync\('.env.local','utf8'\);for\(const l of env.split\('\\n'\)\){const m=l.match\(/^\([A-Z_]+\)=\(.*\)$/\);if\(m\)process.env[m[1]]=m[2].trim\(\);}const db=createClient\(process.env.SUPABASE_URL,process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY,{auth:{persistSession:false}}\);db.from\('rate_limits'\).delete\({count:'exact'}\).neq\('id',0\).then\(\({count,error}\)=>console.log\(error?\('ERR '+error.message\):\('cleared '+count+' rate_limit rows'\)\)\);")
